brief_html: Verifies that a file is authentic, by producing a hash of that file and sending it to the server for comparison to the original.
format:
(UINT32) File size in bytes
(UINT32) File hash [5]
(STRING) Filename
remarks_html:
Verifies that a file is authentic, by producing a hash of that file and sending it to the server for comparison to the original.

The hash is a standard SHA1 hash.
